status_detail: h2_hold_request=1 did NOT fix the warning display issue. Response body BODY_PRESENT in DevTools Response tab - identical NDJSON v2 format as request #495. 6-line response with Korean warning message arrives intact via ReadableStream. But HuggingChat frontend still shows empty chat area. This CONFIRMS the root cause is a frontend parser issue: HuggingChat SvelteKit does not consume/render the APF-injected NDJSON stream despite it arriving correctly. h2_hold_request change has no effect because the response body was already reaching the browser (proven in #495).
conclusion: h2_hold_request is irrelevant. Problem is frontend parser: HuggingChat does not render injected NDJSON. Need alternative approach - either DOM injection via JS or different response format that SvelteKit streaming parser accepts.
